name: VR Travel Venice with Claudia – Carnival

reviews.review_description:
I really enjoyed this experience! The tour guide, Claudia, spoke in a very charming and informative way. She shared many fascinating details that I would have never noticed on my own.

Overall, a well-made and engaging app that brings St. Mark’s Square to life in a unique way. Highly recommended!

Wasn’t sure what to expect, but was not disappointed.  It’s a tour guide of Venice.  The guide is likable and it’s very informative.  It’s also fairly priced.  I dinged it a star because you can’t forward or rewind (however it does let you stop and continue).  Internet is required for this experience, and while yes, there are tons of free videos in YouTube, the quality of this was great.  It’s not perfect, but i enjoyed it and world recommend it.

The Venice tour with Claudia & Dart was informative, fun and joyful. Claudia is very knowledgeable, authentic and super friendly. Her storytelling is inspiring and exciting. Visiting together with them Gianni Camuffo's atelier & shop, with his beautiful and unique Murano Glass artworks, was a great experience.
